summary.hostile_finding: The asserted consult-only recoveries were not actually absent from the baseline. The baseline files already contained the relevant clusters, source IDs, or pressure tests.

baseline_evidence: baseline/convergence_report.json PCR-003 explicitly lists PMID-31827267, PMID-35099507, PMID-40063015, and PMID-39179297 under vascular pathology as therapy-relevant contradiction.
baseline/contradiction_graph.json BASE-C05 already frames vascular pathology as co-cause versus comorbidity.
items.hostile_note: Only the exact ARIA-safety label was sharpened after consult; the evidence and search path were already visible.

baseline_evidence: baseline/evidence_clusters.json BCL-BIOMARKERS includes PMID-39068545, PMID-38866966, PMID-39068669, PMID-41324928, and OFF-NIA-BLOOD-BIOMARKERS-2024.
baseline/convergence_report.json PCR-004 explicitly warns against treating blood biomarker progress as settled.
items.hostile_note: The deployment-threshold contradiction was already named as a baseline pressure test.

baseline_evidence: baseline/evidence_clusters.json BCL-MIXED-PATHOLOGY includes LATE/PART/mixed pathology sources PMID-37563264, PMID-38520489, PMID-40164861, PMID-38619853, and PMID-35649653.
baseline/convergence_report.json PCR-002 lists PMID-37563264, PMID-38520489, and PMID-40164861 as missed-or-underweighted sources.
items.hostile_note: The claim that LATE/PART/mixed pathology required consult is not supported by the baseline artifacts.

baseline_evidence: baseline/hypothesis_map.json starting uncertainty boundary already states unclear and multi-factorial etiology.
baseline/top_10_bottlenecks.md item 10 asks for tests separating cause, marker, response, and treatment-modifiable driver.
baseline/evidence_clusters.json already contains amyloid therapy, metabolic, immune, vascular, and mixed pathology clusters.
items.hostile_note: The exact single-target-versus-multifactorial wording was synthesized later, but its ingredients were baseline-visible.
